category_sources: Official KLEE docs describe KLEE tutorials and internals for symbolic execution.
display_name_sources: Official site and repository use the uppercase name KLEE.
docs_sources: Official KLEE documentation page at klee-se.org/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/klee/klee; per instruction, not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official KLEE repository/about text identifies it as a symbolic execution engine with LLVM bitcode execution components.
